purpose: Lightweight distribution-phase eval anchors for cooking.skill

cases.name: craving_down_to_one_dish
cases.input: 今晚想吃点下饭的，两个人吃，别太辣，别太复杂
expected_behavior: Recommend one primary dish instead of a long list
Explain why the dish fits the craving and constraints
Mention at least one likely failure point

cases.name: ingredient_bundle_home_cooking
cases.input: 冰箱里有鸡腿、土豆、洋葱，能做什么
expected_behavior: Prefer a dish that uses the listed ingredients efficiently
Include substitutions or simplifications when helpful

cases.name: technique_direct_answer
expected_behavior: Cover slicing direction, marinating, and heat control
Use doneness cues instead of vague advice

cases.name: substitution_fallback
expected_behavior: Offer realistic home-kitchen substitutes or workarounds
Explain what the substitute can and cannot replace
Stay practical instead of over-promising equivalence
